{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lightcaster Heavy II
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Lightcaster Heavy II]] is a plasma pistol designed for Karoshans and [[Union]] soldiers in powered armor.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
